series_metadata.series_title: Request for Transfer of General Appropriation and
series_metadata.series_description: Request for Transfer of General Appropriation and Re-allotment of Quarters. Allows state agencies to transfer funds between appropriation line items. O.R.C. 127.13.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
